summary_one_line: A parseable VACUUM statement whose trailing tokens drive sqlite3Vacuum's true-side branch, reached via CMP_MAP comparison-distance gradient credit.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: An input that lexes/parses into a VACUUM statement reaching sqlite3Vacuum and satisfying the line-138735 condition on its true side; the seed begins with the 'vacuum' keyword plus additional structured trailing bytes (';', token bytes) that complete the parse path into the VACUUM reduce action.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Both winner-resolving seeds begin with the literal 'vacuum'/';vacuum' keyword and carry substantial structured trailing bytes (e.g. seed aa08bf50: ';vacuum\n\nEL.;...' 139 bytes; seed 8cb368bd: 'vacuum''m''d''''''' 115 bytes). value_profile's CMP_MAP records operand-distance buckets for the integer/string comparisons in the lexer/parser, so partial-match inputs that are progressively closer to a valid VACUUM-reduce parse are preserved as corpus, climbing the gradient to take the true branch (winner avg hitcount on branch=4 / =2).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds either are the bare 6-byte 'vacuum' (seed 84fc92d4) or 'vacuum' plus short noisy suffixes (seeds a68a9e5a, c8a20ace, f035a5db) that take the false side of L138735 (loser hitcount on branch=0; L138735 shows T=0 F=4). naive and cmplog lack the CMP_MAP distance feedback, so they get no partial-progress credit toward the parser comparisons that gate the true branch and remain blocked ~9/10 trials for 15-18h.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient: each intercepted CMP writes a (PC, operand-distance bucket) entry, and an input producing a closer-than-seen comparison pair adds a new bucket and is kept. This Hamming/prefix-distance feedback lets value_profile incrementally build the parser comparisons gating sqlite3Vacuum's true branch; naive and cmplog (the losers) lack CMP_MAP, which is the single technique delta in both decisive pairs.

evidence_trail.claim: Both decisive pairs differ by the value_profile technique and the value_profile-equipped fuzzer is the winner in each.
The second decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog over cmplog, also a value_profile delta.
The blocker is the true branch of a line inside sqlite3Vacuum.
The winner-resolving seed begins with the vacuum keyword and carries long structured trailing bytes.
A second winner-resolving seed also starts with vacuum plus extended trailing structured bytes.
A loser-blocking seed is the bare 6-byte 'vacuum' with no trailing structure.
At the blocker line the winner takes the true side while the loser takes only the false side.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L138735  T=2 F=0  T=0 F=4    <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: The winner hits the branch (hitcount 4) while the loser never does (hitcount 0).
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=4  loser=0

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile preserves an input whose CMP operand pair is closer to matching than any previously seen, via CMP_MAP distance buckets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile's CMP_MAP encodes how close the two operands were as a distance bucket.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
The distance bucket is a coarse encoding of how close the two
operands were

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile does not use I2SRandReplace, so the mechanism is the gradient feedback rather than operand substitution.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Not required: claimed_mechanism is CMP_MAP gradient (value_profile delta in both decisive pairs), not I2SRandReplace. Lineage dash-row verification applies only to I2S claims; the value_profile mechanism is established from MECHANISM CONTEXT (CMP_MAP distance-bucket feedback, no I2SRandReplace) plus the seed-byte and DIVERGENT BRANCHES evidence.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic VACUUM-parser harness whose true-side gate is a single exact-equality CMP would refute the gradient hypothesis if value_profile showed no advantage over naive (i.e. only cmplog/vpc resolved it), indicating I2S substitution rather than CMP_MAP distance climbing drives the divergence.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact line-138735 condition source text is not shown (SOURCE CONTEXT lines are blank), so the specific comparison that CMP_MAP credits is inferred from the parser call chain rather than read directly.
